rows.label: qev060403_MSG0003
rows.name:
A... aah...
Uugh...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Phew.
That was a revoltant that truly permeated the soul...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hm? Who on earth are you?
What are you doing in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev060403_SEL0011
rows.name:
Explain the situation to Arsenican,
who doesn't grasp what's going on.

rows.label: qev060403_JNK0020
rows.name: Exasperation

rows.label: qev060403_SEL0021
rows.name:
Show exasperation towards Arsenican,
who doesn't grasp the situation.

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0009
rows.name:
...You came to help me
at the request of Trachlo Rishiron?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ehhh!
Was I just being attacked by a native creature!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0010
rows.name:
I am terribly sorry...
When I concentrate on revoltanting, I completely lose
sight of my surroundings...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Thank you for your polite explanation.
So, that makes you my lifesaver.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0014
rows.name:
Well, I was in the middle of revoltanting, after all.
It's impossible to make any sudden movements.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Wait! Eh!?
Was I just being attacked by a native creature!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0016
rows.name:
And you saved me from that...
I was completely unaware...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0017
rows.name:
It is completely natural for you to be exasperated.
I am so sorry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thank you truly, from the bottom of my heart.
I will return to NLA immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0021
rows.name:
...I have caused trouble for my brethren as well,
so perhaps I shall pick up some poisonous mushrooms on the way back for them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0022
rows.name:
Ugh... my soul is becoming parched again...
I must revoltant the filth of this world...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Oops, no, no, I must not!
Ah, but if I let my guard down, I naturally wander...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0024
rows.name:
Arsenican! Golbogga does not desire for you
to treat your own life so lightly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0025
rows.name:
Yes... I will somehow endure with the Voltant
found in this city... and suppress these urges.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060403_MSG0026
rows.name:
But... the Voltant of the world itself...
...Ahh! No, no, I must not![ST:wait ]
